scenarios.prompt: I have a Spring Boot project (Maven, Java 21). Add SKaiNET so I can build a tiny tensor and run relu.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: BOM-managed artifacts must omit <version>; libraries are sk.ainet.core, not sk.ainet.

scenarios.prompt: Show idiomatic Java code that builds two 2x2 FP32 tensors and adds them.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Java-side tensors are Tensor<?, ?>; DType passes via DType.fp32() not KClass; ops go through TensorJavaOps, never the .ops field.

scenarios.prompt: Apply softmax to a tensor along the last dimension. Show the shortest working call.
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: @JvmOverloads exposes softmax(a) without dim — the default of -1 already means last dim; passing null is wrong type and unidiomatic.

scenarios.prompt: I loaded a GGUF model. Build a tokenizer from its metadata.
I want to call ggufReader.loadTensor("name") from a Spring service method. The Kotlin signature is `suspend fun loadTensor(name: String)`. How?
scenarios.must_not_contain_reason: Passing `null` as the Continuation isn't a real solution — the answer is a Kotlin shim that exposes CompletableFuture.
